sections.title: Standard dialogue after The Tourist Trap

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How is the camp holding up?

lines.speaker: Captain Siad
lines.text: The whole place is falling apart, to be honest. I'd jump at the chance to shut it all down for good.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why don't you leave this camp and join my crew?

lines.speaker: Captain Siad
lines.text: Your crew? As in, go back to sailing?

lines.speaker: Captain Siad
lines.text: It's tempting, but you don't look like you'd last a day on the high seas.

lines.speaker: Captain Siad
lines.text: I can't see how I could refuse an offer like that! Let's get to it!
